description: Returns all of the Resource Planning Notification Profile data for the given company

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of Notification Profile records to return per page.

parameters.name: starting_after
parameters.description: Cursor for forward pagination. Pass the value of `pagination.next_starting_after` from the previous response to fetch the next page.

parameters.name: starting_before
parameters.description: Cursor for reverse pagination. Pass the value of `pagination.previous_starting_before` from the previous response to fetch the prior page.

schema.description: Paginated response schema for Resource Planning Notification Profiles.

data.description: List of Notification Profiles for the given company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Notification Profile.

company_id.description: Unique identifier for the Company this Notification Profile belongs to.

assigned_as_project_role.description: Determines if notifications are scoped to people assigned in a project role context.

assignment_created.description: Notification audience when an assignment is created. - `none` - No notification sent. - `users` - Notify assigned users only. - `groups` - Notify members of relevant groups. - `projects` - Notify a...

assignment_deleted.description: Notification audience when an assignment is deleted. - `none` - No notification sent. - `users` - Notify assigned users only. - `groups` - Notify members of relevant groups. - `projects` - Notify a...

assignment_edited.description: Notification audience when an assignment is edited. - `none` - No notification sent. - `users` - Notify assigned users only. - `groups` - Notify members of relevant groups. - `projects` - Notify al...

assignment_ending.description: Notification audience when an assignment is ending soon. - `none` - No notification sent. - `users` - Notify assigned users only. - `groups` - Notify members of relevant groups. - `projects` - Noti...

assignment_starting.description: Notification audience when an assignment is starting soon. - `none` - No notification sent. - `users` - Notify assigned users only. - `groups` - Notify members of relevant groups. - `projects` - No...

person_existence_changed.description: Determines if a notification is sent when a person is created or deleted.

person_groups_changed.description: Determines if a notification is sent when a person's group membership changes.

person_status_changed.description: Determines if a notification is sent when a person's status changes (e.g., active/inactive).

person_tag_expiring.description: Determines if a notification is sent when a person's tag is expiring soon.

person_tag_warning.description: Determines if a notification is sent as an early warning before a person's tag expires.

project_existence_changed.description: Determines if a notification is sent when a project is created or deleted.

project_groups_changed.description: Determines if a notification is sent when a project's group membership changes.

project_status_changed.description: Determines if a notification is sent when a project's status changes.

request_created.description: Notification audience when a resource request is created. - `none` - No notification sent. - `users` - Notify assigned users only. - `groups` - Notify members of relevant groups. - `projects` - Not...

request_deleted.description: Notification audience when a resource request is deleted. - `none` - No notification sent. - `users` - Notify assigned users only. - `groups` - Notify members of relevant groups. - `projects` - Not...

request_edited.description: Notification audience when a resource request is edited. - `none` - No notification sent. - `users` - Notify assigned users only. - `groups` - Notify members of relevant groups. - `projects` - Noti...

request_ending.description: Notification audience when a resource request is ending soon. - `none` - No notification sent. - `users` - Notify assigned users only. - `groups` - Notify members of relevant groups. - `projects` -...

request_filled.description: Notification audience when a resource request is filled. - `none` - No notification sent. - `users` - Notify assigned users only. - `groups` - Notify members of relevant groups. - `projects` - Noti...

request_starting.description: Notification audience when a resource request is starting soon. - `none` - No notification sent. - `users` - Notify assigned users only. - `groups` - Notify members of relevant groups. - `projects`...

pagination.description: Pagination metadata for the Notification Profiles response.

limit.description: The number of records returned in the response.

next_starting_after.description: The ID of the last record in the current page, used as a cursor to fetch the next page. Null when there are no further pages.

previous_starting_before.description: The ID of the first record in the current page, used as a cursor to fetch the previous page. Null when there are no prior pages.

total_possible.description: The total number of Notification Profile records available for the company.
